title: Termination of the accreditation of the Securities Dealer Representative Licence of  Mr. George David Kohler (SDR246)
text:
Termination of the accreditation of the Securities Dealer Representative Licence of  Mr. George David Kohler (SDR246)

The Financial Services Authority (“FSA/Authority”) hereby gives notice to the general public, pursuant Section 4(1)(m) of the Financial Services Authority Act, 2013 (“FSA Act”), the accreditation of Mr. George David Kohler as the Representative of ACG MARKETS LTD has been terminated, effective as of February 17th, 2026.
